comment: Notice Board gigs (spec §7): 1-3 fresh offers daily, one slot each, paid instantly. Skill scaling arrives with the skills system; base pay for now. The quiz gig is the learning-is-earning mechanic (design doc §11 layer 2) — wrong answers still pay a kind tip and show the right answer.

questions.q: You save €10 every week. How much do you have after 4 weeks?
The bank pays you interest on savings. What does that mean?
answers: The bank pays YOU for saving

questions.q: Which of these is a NEED, not a want?
